violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the market shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Ceiling tiles in the market are stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The wall outside the restroom in the back area is in poor repair, with chipped and crumbling material. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
